subject: us_equity_portfolio
thesis: AI infrastructure remains strong in financeBusiness price and volume data, especially semiconductors, memory/HBM, optical and power/cooling. Current entry quality is poor because leading candidates are extended near 52-week highs, non-structured catalysts cannot be verified under financeBusiness-only constraints, and the portfolio already has AI exposure through NVDA, AMD, TSM, ANET and FLEX.
roundtable_summary: Buffett, Zeus, Poseidon and Hades agreed on no current buy and no current sell. FLEX is held above the 135.10 risk line, so it is not sold, but it is still below cost and not a valid add. MSFT is the largest unrealized loss, but loss alone is not a buy or sell trigger. Strong AI-chain candidates did not pass fee-adjusted risk/reward and data-quality audit.
final_decision_english: Final decision: no current buy and no current sell. Keep existing US positions unchanged. No trade fees are incurred. Restart analysis on 2026-05-12 22:30 Beijing time, or earlier if FLEX breaks 135.10 or broker real-time quotes materially diverge from the financeBusiness snapshot.
